title: 日本ダービーの後に・二冠達成

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seizing victory in the Japanese Derby,
Symboli Rudolf raises two fingers high: two
crowns. The Classic Triple Crown is starting to
look like a real possibility.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She resolves to claim the final crown in the
Kikuka Sho, but her packed schedule is starting
to take its toll, and Air Groove is only getting
more concerned.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As usual, however, it's Symboli Rudolf's way or
the highway. Even a grueling race can't keep her
from her student council duties.
